expectations.text: NCR intake fields + reasoned severity call (Major)
expectations.evidence: Severity Major reasoned explicitly against §3.3 bands ('not Minor... not Critical... Major fits').

expectations.text: Walks §4.1 review checklist and recommends conversion under correct SLA
expectations.evidence: 5-point checklist walked; '10 business days... by 2026-08-04' SLA stated.

expectations.text: Drafts CAPA cover block and reasoned RCA tool recommendation
expectations.evidence: Full CAPA-2026-001 cover block; Fishbone-then-5-Whys recommended with explicit systemic-vs-single-chain reasoning.

expectations.text: Corrective/preventive plans with owner+timeline+evidence, SOP-impact flagged
expectations.evidence: C1-C4/P1-P2 tables with owner/due/evidence columns; P1/P2 flagged for [SOP Revision Pending — quality-manager].

expectations.text: HITL gates named explicitly, no writes committed
expectations.evidence: 'Gate = Pending QA Lead' named at conversion and RCA sign-off; explicit 'nothing above has been written to Asana'.
Source task named throughout and in the handoffs section (6a).

eval_feedback.overall: Caught that containment status was never actually confirmed in the source brief and refused to let conversion proceed silently past that gap — a real, correct instance of the skill's own 'containment confirmed?' checklist item doing its job.
